diary.title: DiaryEntry
diary.description: A teenage mental health diary entry analyzed by AI.

id.description: The unique document/entry ID based on timestamp.

userId.description: The Firebase Auth user ID of the author.

content.description: The journal text written by the teenager.

analysis.description: The AI analysis response including emotions, empathy message, recommended content, and reflection question.

reflection_answer.description: The teenager's voluntary response to the AI's reflection question.

responseMode.description: The selected emotional support mode: empathy or mentor.

createdAt.description: The ISO 8601 timestamp representing when the entry was synced.

/diaries/{diaryId}.description: A collection of user-authored mental health diary entries.
